title: Guijarromon
description: Dive into the world of Guijarromon, a modpack for Minecraft that fuses the essence of Pokémon with classic Minecraft gameplay.
body:
![Cover](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mochos/mochos.github.io/refs/heads/main/guijarromon/marca/cover.png)

Dive into the world of Guijarromon, a modpack for Minecraft that fuses the essence of Pokémon with classic Minecraft gameplay. This modpack allows you to capture, train, and battle with over 600 creatures inspired by Pokémon, offering a unique and exciting experience.

## Main Features
**Capture and Training:** Catch Pokémon to expand your team and battle wild creatures to gain experience. Improve your skills and unlock new moves as your Pokémon evolve.

**Advanced Combat Mechanics:** Utilize the Pokémon Showdown battle engine for precise competitive battles, maintaining the thrill of confrontations.

**Enhanced Visual Quality:** The modpack is designed to enhance the visual and auditory experience without demanding too much from your computer, preserving the essence of the original game.

**Additional Content:** Includes optional features such as recommended resource packs and shaders, which are disabled by default for customization to your liking.

## Game Mode
Welcome to Guijarromon, a world designed to familiarize you with the features of the Cobblemon mod. Your mission is to help local inhabitants maintain their agricultural community while learning about the game mechanics. Additionally, you will be able to explore a museum showcasing the new archaeological features introduced in recent updates.
